business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial Building Construction (Carpentry, Electrical, Plumbing, Masonry, Painting)

coverages_discussed.notes: Experience Modification Factor of 0.86 approved for policy period 08/01/2025 to 08/01/2026. Total payroll $31,094,800 across 7 class codes.

positives: Final Experience Modification Factor of 0.86 (credit mod, below 1.00)
Actual excess losses ($212,733) significantly below expected excess losses ($1,132,496)
Diversified operations across multiple construction trades
concerns: 10 claims in 2021-2022 policy year (highest frequency year)
High-hazard class codes including Masonry, Carpentry, and Electrical Wiring
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 20 total claims over 3 years with $546,531 paid and $548,454 incurred. Primary losses $335,671 and excess losses $212,733. Claim frequency: 7 (2023-2024), 3 (2022-2023), 10 (2021-2022).

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: PCRB Experience Rating Worksheet for Keystone Commercial Builders, Inc. Risk ID 609402-1243. Final Experience Modification Factor of 0.86 effective 08/01/2025, approved 03/15/2026 by Analyst ID RA-9405.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Construction operations including Carpentry-NOC (Class 5403), Electrical Wiring (5190), Plumbing-NOC (5183), Masonry-NOC (5022), Painting-Interior (5474), Contractors-Project Manager/Superintendent (5606), and Clerical Office Employees-NOC (8810).
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Three-year loss experience: 2023-2024: 7 claims, $190,770 paid, $191,231 incurred; 2022-2023: 3 claims, $115,267 paid, $116,479 incurred; 2021-2022: 10 claims, $240,694 paid, $240,694 incurred. Totals: 20 claims, $546,531 paid, $548,454 incurred, $335,671 primary losses, $212,733 excess losses.
